MODULE: cosmos.agents.hierarchical_teams
FILE: cosmos/agents/hierarchical_teams.py (719 lines)
CATEGORY: agents

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Hierarchical Agent Teams - Multi-Level Agent Organization

Novel Approaches:
1. Manager Agents - Coordinate specialist teams
2. Dynamic Team Formation - Create teams for specific tasks
3. Load Balancing - Distribute work across agents
4. Escalation Protocols - Handle failures gracefully

CLASSES:
- AgentRole(Enum): Roles in the hierarchy.
- TeamStatus(Enum): Team operational status.
- AgentNode: An agent in the hierarchy.
  Methods: def is_overloaded(self) -> bool
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- Team: A team of agents working together.
  Methods: def success_rate(self) -> float
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- TaskAssignment: Assignment of a task to an agent/team.
- HierarchicalTeams: Hierarchical agent team management system.

Features:
- Multi-level agent hierar
  Methods: async def create_agent(self, agent_id: str, name: str, role: AgentRole, specializations: Optional[li
  Methods: async def form_team(self, purpose: str, required_specializations: list[str], manager_preference: Opt
  Methods: async def assign_task(self, task_type: str, description: str, preferred_agent: Optional[str]=None, t
  Methods: async def complete_task(self, task_id: str, success: bool, result: Optional[Any]=None, error: Option
  Methods: async def escalate_task(self, task_id: str, reason: str) -> TaskAssignment
  Methods: async def rebalance_workload(self)
  Methods: async def delegate_to_team(self, team_id: str, task_type: str, description: str) -> dict
  Methods: async def disband_team(self, team_id: str) -> bool
